topStories.title: Countries agree to record release of emergency oil reserves as prices surge
topStories.description: The G7 group of nations welcomes the idea of releasing oil in response to the surge in prices since the US-Israel war with Iran began

topStories.title: ‘Practically nothing left to target’: Trump says Iran war will end ‘soon’
topStories.description: Trump insisted that the military operation had already caused extensive damage to Iranian capabilities.

topStories.title: US-Israel, Iran conflict: IEA to release 400 mn barrels of oil as Middle East war rattles global energy market
topStories.description: The International Energy Agency (IEA) on Wednesday (local time) announced that it will release 400 million barrels of oil from its emergency stockpile available to the market to address disruptions in the global energy markets stemming from the war in the Middle East.

topStories.title: Iran's new leader Mojtaba Khamenei injured in airstrike that killed his father: Iran’s ambassador to Cyprus
topStories.description: The strike occurred during US-led air operations targeting Iran, when the residential compound of the supreme leader in central Tehran was hit.

dailyNews.title: Oil tanker seized by US in relation to Venezuela set to transfer crude to smaller vessel
dailyNews.description: USA-VENEZUELA/TANKER-SEIZURE:Oil tanker seized by US in relation to Venezuela set to transfer crude to smaller vessel

dailyNews.title: Three brothers arrested after explosion at US embassy in Oslo
dailyNews.description: Norway's police attorney says the authorities are investigating whether a foreign state actor was involved.

dailyNews.title: Trump attacks Thomas Massie as ‘worst Republican Congressman’, endorses Gallrein in Kentucky primary
dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump sharply criticised Thomas Massie and endorsed his primary challenger as tensions grow within the Republican Party ahead of the midterm elections. Massie has opposed several Trump policies, including strikes on Iran and efforts to curb presidential war powers.

dailyNews.title: FBI warns of possible Iranian drone threat to California: Report
dailyNews.description: The alert indicated that Iran could retaliate against American attacks by launching drones along the West Coast.

dailyNews.title: Parliament likely to take up Bill to codify IPS deputation in CAPFs this session
dailyNews.description: The Bill intends to codify the functioning of the Central Armed Police Forces (CAPFs) and is in response to a May 2025 Supreme Court ruling that asked the Ministry of Home Affairs (MHA) to “progressively reduce” the deputation of IPS officers

dailyNews.title: Stryker cyberattack: Iranian group claims responsibility - 'Erased 200,000 systems, extracted 50 terabytes of data'
dailyNews.description: In a statement, Handala referred to the US missile attack on a girls' school in Minab city of Iran, that killed dozens, as one of the reasons for the hacking.

dailyNews.title: Bowen: Trump has called for an Iran uprising but the lessons from Iraq in 1991 loom large
dailyNews.description: The US president might learn that starting wars is much easier than ending them, writes the BBC's international editor.

dailyNews.title: 'Even under missiles we carry on living' - how young Iranians are coping with war
dailyNews.description: Iranians say they are sheltering at home and rarely venturing out on near-empty streets as the US-Israeli bombing campaign continues.

dailyNews.description: The G7 group of nations welcomes the idea of releasing oil in response to the surge in prices since the US-Israel war with Iran began

dailyNews.description: Trump insisted that the military operation had already caused extensive damage to Iranian capabilities.

dailyNews.description: The International Energy Agency (IEA) on Wednesday (local time) announced that it will release 400 million barrels of oil from its emergency stockpile available to the market to address disruptions in the global energy markets stemming from the war in the Middle East.

dailyNews.title: Iran's new leader Mojtaba Khamenei injured in airstrike that killed his father: Iran’s ambassador to Cyprus
dailyNews.description: The strike occurred during US-led air operations targeting Iran, when the residential compound of the supreme leader in central Tehran was hit.

dailyNews.title: Who was Aruna Shanbaug? How her 42-year vegetative state paved way for passive euthanasia
dailyNews.description: The Supreme Court rejected a plea by Shanbaug's family to end her life, and she died from pneumonia in 2015, aged 66. But it did issue a landmark opinion recognising passive euthanasia under strict safeguards and with judicial approval.

dailyNews.title: Florida mom accused of abandoning daughter at Universal Studios to go drinking at bar
dailyNews.description: A Florida mother was arrested and charged with child neglect after allegedly leaving her 12-year-old daughter alone at a Universal CityWalk bar while she went drinking elsewhere, authorities said.

dailyNews.title: Nearly half of seniors improve with age — and researchers think they know why
dailyNews.description: Nearly half of adults 65+ improved cognitively or physically over 12 years, a new Yale study finds. Positive beliefs were linked to better outcomes.

dailyNews.title: Mysterious calls placed from NYC terror suspect family's home hours after alleged ISIS-inspired attack
dailyNews.description: Two Pennsylvania men accused of an ISIS-inspired NYC terror plot lived 10 miles apart but came from vastly different backgrounds before their arrests.

dailyNews.title: Wife of former Gov Terry McAuliffe jumps into crowded Dem congressional primary race
dailyNews.description: Dorothy McAuliffe, the wife of former Virginia Gov. Terry McAuliffe, entered the Democratic primary for Virginia’s 7th Congressional District on Wednesday.

dailyNews.title: Dead Kennedys frontman Jello Biafra hospitalized after suffering hemorrhagic stroke
dailyNews.description: Dead Kennedys frontman Jello Biafra was reportedly hospitalized after suffering a hemorrhagic stroke. The 67-year-old punk rock legend is reportedly stable.

dailyNews.title: Jill Biden vows to 'set the record straight' in upcoming memoir about Biden presidency, 2024 exit
dailyNews.description: Jill Biden's new memoir will reportedly discuss her husband's presidency and 2024 campaign exit, as the former first lady called the writing process "cathartic" and personal.

dailyNews.title: Hawley introduces bill to strip FDA approval from 'inherently dangerous' abortion pill
dailyNews.description: Sen. Josh Hawley, R-Mo., introduced a bill to ban the abortion pill mifepristone, calling it "inherently dangerous" and citing research on serious side effects.

dailyNews.title: Spain permanently pulls ambassador from Israel amid Iran war
dailyNews.description: Spain announced on Tuesday it was permanently recalling its ambassador to Israel over its opposition to U.S.-Israeli strikes against Iran.

dailyNews.title: Transfer photos from your phone to a hard drive
dailyNews.description: Learn how to transfer photos from your phone to a hard drive and avoid paying for additional cloud storage while keeping full access to your images.

dailyNews.title: Reporter's Notebook: Trump's SAVE Act ultimatum runs into Senate reality
dailyNews.description: Trump demands Senate Republicans pass SAVE America Act requiring proof of citizenship to vote, but GOP leaders say they lack votes for filibuster.

dailyNews.title: Colts sign Daniel Jones to record-breaking contract as he recovers from Achilles injury: reports
dailyNews.description: Colts reportedly sign Daniel Jones to a two-year, $88 million contract worth up to $100 million, making it the largest two-year deal in NFL history.

topStories.title: Trump attacks Thomas Massie as ‘worst Republican Congressman’, endorses Gallrein in Kentucky primary
topStories.description: US President Donald Trump sharply criticised Thomas Massie and endorsed his primary challenger as tensions grow within the Republican Party ahead of the midterm elections. Massie has opposed several Trump policies, including strikes on Iran and efforts to curb presidential war powers.

topStories.title: Bowen: Trump has called for an Iran uprising but the lessons from Iraq in 1991 loom large
topStories.description: The US president might learn that starting wars is much easier than ending them, writes the BBC's international editor.

topStories.title: ‘Practically nothing left to target’: Trump says Iran war will end ‘soon’
topStories.description: Trump insisted that the military operation had already caused extensive damage to Iranian capabilities.

topStories.title: Reporter's Notebook: Trump's SAVE Act ultimatum runs into Senate reality
topStories.description: Trump demands Senate Republicans pass SAVE America Act requiring proof of citizenship to vote, but GOP leaders say they lack votes for filibuster.

topStories.title: House GOP leader launches Senate bid as Trump taps Markwayne Mullin for DHS
topStories.description: GOP Rep. Kevin Hern launches his Oklahoma Senate bid to replace DHS nominee Markwayne Mullin, vowing to be a "loyal ally" to President Trump’s "America First" agenda.

topStories.title: U.S. at Fault in Strike on School in Iran, Preliminary Inquiry Says
topStories.description: Outdated targeting data may have resulted in a mistaken missile strike, according to the ongoing military investigation, which undercuts President Trump’s assertion that Iran could be to blame.

topStories.title: How Trump and His Advisers Miscalculated Iran’s Response to War
topStories.description: In the lead-up to the U.S.-Israeli attack, President Trump downplayed the risks to the energy markets as a short-term concern that should not overshadow the mission to decapitate the Iranian regime.

topStories.title: Thune Is in a Vise as Trump and the Far Right Demand a Fight on SAVE America Act
topStories.description: The majority leader is getting pounded for not pushing hard enough, but he says the votes just aren’t there to circumvent the filibuster.

topStories.title: U.S. Seeks Extradition of Maduro Ally Alex Saab From Venezuela
topStories.description: The indicted tycoon Alex Saab is being detained in Venezuela on a U.S. request. His case tests President Trump’s sway over the country’s new rulers.

topStories.title: 17 Democratic States Sue Over Trump Demand Colleges Provide Race Data
topStories.description: The Trump administration wants colleges and universities to share information about the race and gender of applicants to make sure they’re not using racial preferences in admissions.

topStories.title: Trump Documents Missing in Epstein Files Highlight DOJ’s Missteps
topStories.description: In late July, an F.B.I. agent asked colleagues to get started on a sensitive task relating to Jeffrey Epstein, listing the names of 14 prominent men, with President Trump at the top.

topStories.title: Trump Administration to Announce New Trade Investigations
topStories.description: The investigations into unfair trade practices will likely lead to tariffs on foreign countries, as the administration works to replace the import taxes struck down by the Supreme Court.

dailyNews.title: Trump Administration to Announce New Trade Investigations
dailyNews.description: The investigations into unfair trade practices will likely lead to tariffs on foreign countries, as the administration works to replace the import taxes struck down by the Supreme Court.

dailyNews.title: Trump Is the Anti-Trump
dailyNews.description: There is an alternate universe in which the president is the popular, successful figure of his imagination.

dailyNews.title: What to know about the agency Trump says will insure ships in the Gulf
dailyNews.description: President Trump said the government agency will provide political risk insurance to "all shipping lines" operating in the Persian Gulf.

dailyNews.title: Trump vows to end war "soon" as Iran hits ships and threatens banks
dailyNews.description: President Trump says he'll end the war soon, when he wants to, as Iran hits three ships near the Strait of Hormuz and warns U.S.-linked banks will be next.

dailyNews.title: 3/07: Saturday Morning
dailyNews.description: President Trump said on social media that Iran will be "hit very hard" on Saturday after Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian apologized to the country's regional neighbors for retaliatory strikes against Israel and U.S. bases in the Middle East.

dailyNews.title: Trump says most of Iran's navy is gone
dailyNews.description: President Trump stopped to speak with reporters on Wednesday as he headed to Kentucky, where he touted the U.S. military's operation against Iran, claiming that most of Tehran's navy is "gone."

dailyNews.title: Trump expects military to do 'more of the same' in Iran
dailyNews.description: Trump expects military to do 'more of the same' in Iran

dailyNews.title: Trump threatens more strikes if Iran halts world oil supply
dailyNews.description: Trump threatens more strikes if Iran halts world oil supply

dailyNews.title: Iran war: Trump says he's not worried about domestic terror attack
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump said oil companies should send tankers through the Strait of Hormuz, which has remained effectively closed due to the war on Iran.

dailyNews.title: Tim Scott hopes Fed Chair Powell investigation 'goes away' to clear Kevin Warsh confirmation
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump nominated Kevin Warsh to succeed Jerome Powell as Fed chair, but the process has been blocked amid a federal investigation into Powell.

dailyNews.title: Who is Markwayne Mullin? Trump ally will bring conservative immigration policies to DHS
dailyNews.description: Republicans are optimistic about Markwayne Mullin taking over the reins at DHS, while Democrats warn his tenure will be more of the same after Kristi Noem.

dailyNews.title: WATCH:  War will end with Iran's 'unconditional surrender,' WH press secretary Leavitt says
dailyNews.description: Leavitt said a timeline for the end of the military operation in Iran would be left up to President Trump and would only happen when there is an "unconditional surrender" of the Iranian regime.

dailyNews.title: WATCH:  Trump 'would not be happy' if Russia was sharing intelligence with Iran
dailyNews.description: WH press sec. Karoline Leavitt told ABC News' Karen Travers neither Pres. Trump nor U.S. special envoy Steve Witkoff "would be happy" if it turns out Russia has been sharing intelligence with Iran.
